NAVAREA XIX 138/22
 BARENTS SEA
 1. MISSILE LAUNCH ROCKET CARRIER ELEMENTS FALLING    SCHEDULED 14 TO 17 OCT DAILY 1900 TO 2130UTC
    IN AREAS DANGEROUS TO NAVIGATION BOUNDED BY
 A. 71-54.10N 032-27.27E 
    70-54.52N 033-44.05E 
    70-44.22N 032-28.49E 
    71-43.43N 031-08.00E

 B. 74-25.32N 028-45.15E 
    73-17.05N 030-35.30E 
    73-05.45N 029-11.10E 
    74-14.00N 027-15.18E
 2. CANCEL THIS MESSAGE 172230 OCT 22
